design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Removed unused imports for ArrayList and List to clean up the source file.
Changed TV instance retrieval from a method call to a static field access, implying a change in the TV class structure.
Changed field declarations from concrete command classes to the Command interface to adhere to programming against interfaces.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.human_impl: private VolumeUpCommand volumeUpCommand -> private Command volumeUpCommand

design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Added an explicit cast to NavigateChannelCommand to access the specific setChannel method, which is not part of the Command interface.
Refactor the class-based singleton implementation to use the enum-based singleton pattern for better serialization and reflection safety.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.human_impl: Replaced `public final class TV` with static instance field and `getInstance()` method with `public enum TV { INSTANCE; }`.

design_patterns/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to target Java 21 instead of Java 8.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore JVM crash dump files generated during runtime errors.
